mission.title: fluent-bit: Use system time offset for local datetimes
mission.description: Use system time offset for local datetimes. Requested by 31+ users.

steps.title: Check current fluent-bit deployment
steps.description:
Verify your fluent-bit version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit
helm list -n fluent-bit 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working fluent-bit installation.

steps.title: Review fluent-bit configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant fluent-bit configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit
kubectl get configmap -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=fluent-bit
```
The `Time_Offset` parameter allows to add a fixed UTC offset to local datetimes.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Use system time offset for local datetimes
steps.description:
I found a workaround that uses the configured timezone, e.g. "Europe/Berlin" at the time of parsing the log entry.

* Use a lua filter to parse the timestamp
* Use a linux distribution that fully supports timezone information (ulibc does not work)
* Configure the timezone to use to parse at the
```yaml
Run container with env set:
```

steps.title: Upgrade fluent-bit to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade fluent-bit:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade fluent-bit fluent-bit/fluent-bit --namespace fluent-bit
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n fluent-bit
helm list -n fluent-bit
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n fluent-bit -l app.kubernetes.io/name=fluent-bit
kubectl get events -n fluent-bit --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Use system time offset for local datetimes" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: I found a workaround that uses the configured timezone, e.g. "Europe/Berlin" at the time of parsing the log entry.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with fluent-bit installed or the issue environment reproducible.
